items.title: Volkswagen to cut 50,000 jobs as profits drop
items.description: Europe's largest carmaker said post-tax profits had dropped to their lowest level since 2016.

items.title: Family of child injured in Canada school shooting sues OpenAI
items.description: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.

items.title: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
items.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them "wartime traitors" for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.

items.title: Uber rolls out women-only option in the US
items.description: The feature allows both women riders and drivers to be matched with other women for trips on the ride-sharing app.

items.title: Wildflowers blanket Death Valley in best display since 2016
items.description: The California desert is seeing its most colourful display in a decade as flowers cover the region.
